allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Recurse -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Recurse -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 FullName)
PowerShell($env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'ffmpeg|gyan' } | Select-Object -First 5; winget show Gyan.FFmpeg 2>&1 | Select-String "Location|Install")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Recurse -Depth 4 -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\tools" -Recurse -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
